title: Meshy Saber Offline In Hand
expectedVisibleBehavior: The real saber mesh hilt is inside the authored hand/hilt region in the offline renderer.
The blade visibly emerges from the hand rather than stretching across the torso.
A magenta/debug marker near the wrist does not count as proof unless the real saber mesh is also in hand.
acceptance: The offline visual red-build contract reports ok=true.
The evidence uses the current cache token and the exact Meshy T-pose clip.
The offline evidence proves the real saber mesh hilt is in hand, not only a debug marker.
forbiddenProof: live/browser capture as Meshy saber acceptance evidence
debug marker or fallback hilt used as a substitute for the real saber mesh
deprecated standalone screencap as acceptance evidence
